rows.result: A trusted ally or bond is lost or severed
An important secret is revealed to the wrong person
Someone is harmed — take -2 health, or an NPC is wounded, captured, or killed
You are separated from a companion, ally, or loved one
Your action has an unintended effect that makes things worse
Something precious is lost, damaged, or stolen
The current situation worsens — a new threat emerges, or an existing one escalates
You are delayed or driven off course
You must act against your vow or your people's interest to survive
An adversary gains a new advantage, ally, or resource
Your reputation takes a blow — roll action+theme to determine what rumour spreads
A new danger or complication is introduced — roll the oracle or choose the most pressing threat
A noncombatant, bystander, or innocent is put at risk
You lose footing, position, or the initiative — you must act from a position of disadvantage
Your path ahead is blocked or hidden — you cannot proceed without more information
You are wounded or shaken — take -1 health and -1 spirit
Supply dwindles — take -2 supply
Your spirit falters — take -2 spirit
A vow is jeopardised — mark a complication on its progress track (erase one tick)
You are in a worse position than before and must Face Danger to recover
The enemy is alerted — surprise is lost and they act against you
You pay with flesh — take -3 health; describe the wound
Roll twice and apply both results
Choose the most thematically fitting result from this table
